overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a rural prairie landscape. The character travels along a dirt trail, passes a horse-drawn wagon, and continues through tall grass toward distant mountains under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt trail through rolling prairie

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt trail through open grassland with mountains visible in the distance

entered.detail: large boulder formation beside the trail
deciduous trees with green foliage scattered across the prairie
worn dirt path cutting through the grassland
hazy mountains on the horizon under cloudy sky
tall green grass covering the rolling hills

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through an open prairie landscape. A large rock formation sits to the right while scattered oak trees dot the grassland. Distant mountains rise on the horizon under a partly cloudy afternoon sky.

events.description: horse-drawn covered wagon appears ahead on the trail
wagon passes by on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the trail as a wagon approaches and passes by on the left

notable_agents.action: covered wagon pulled by horses moving along the trail in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wooden covered wagon with white canvas top pulled by two horses

segments.scene_description: A horse-drawn covered wagon appears in the distance and approaches along the trail. The wagon passes by on the left side, moving in the opposite direction, while the character continues walking forward. The large rock formation falls behind as the character progresses.

events.description: trail becomes muddier and more rutted as it winds through the grass

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding trail as the ground becomes increasingly muddy and uneven

entered.detail: group of evergreen pine trees on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: After the wagon passes, the character continues along the trail which becomes increasingly muddy and rutted. A cluster of pine trees becomes visible on the left side while the scattered oak trees recede behind. The trail winds through the open prairie toward the distant mountains.

events.description: character steps off the dirt trail into tall grass field

agents.ego_description: pushing through tall grass, leaving the defined trail behind and heading into the open field

entered.detail: dense tall grass reaching waist height covering the ground where the character walks

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the dirt trail behind and enters a field of tall grass that reaches waist height. The pine trees that were nearby now appear farther in the distance to the left. The character continues walking through the dense grass toward the mountains on the horizon for the remainder of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open prairie that transitions from a dusty trail into a dense field of tall grass. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path past a large rock formation and scattered oak trees under a partly cloudy afternoon sky. As a horse-drawn covered wagon approaches and passes on the left, the camera moves forward, leaving the rock formation behind while the trail becomes increasingly muddy and rutted. The scene then shifts as the oak trees recede and a cluster of pine trees emerges on the left, before the character eventually leaves the path entirely. Finally, the camera follows the character as they push through waist-high grass, with the pine trees fading into the distance while the mountains remain fixed on the horizon.
